title: Aurin's Alternative Skeletal Control
description: Alternative sprite to Skeletal Control for AHZNB's NarutoMod ShinobiCraft!
body:
A resourcepack make only to replace Skeletal Control sprite for another sprite that I saw on Naruto's Wiki. I like it, hope you too.

**Alternative Sprite**
![Alternative Skeletal Control](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d199a3274e013eb9fd0ff33373f48d2af117d82.png)

**Original sprite** from my [Aurin's ShinobiCraft Icons RP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aurins-shinobicraft-icons). (It redos all sprites on high quality based on the originals)
![Original Sprite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a73b9697330836a225d4650b8c58277c406c8e4.png)
